name: pickfix
description: Point, pick, fix — preview-driven development with AI

scripts.predev: lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; rm -rf examples/demo/.next apps/web/.next 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n demo,proxy,web -c blue,green,cyan "pnpm dev:demo" "pnpm dev:proxy" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.dev:proxy: until curl -s --noproxy '*' -o /dev/null http://localhost:3000 2>/dev/null; do sleep 0.5; done; pnpm --filter @pickfix/proxy dev
scripts.dev:web: until curl -s --noproxy '*' -o /dev/null http://localhost:4000 2>/dev/null; do sleep 0.5; done; pnpm --filter @pickfix/web dev
